mapper.select: SELECT l.log_id, l.work_id, l.operation_type, l.operation_time, l.operator_id, l.operation_desc, u.user_name AS operator_name FROM work_time_log l INNER JOIN `user` u ON l.operator_id = u.user_id WHERE l.work_id = #{workId} ORDER BY l.operation_time ASC, l.log_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_time_log ( work_id, operation_type, operation_time, operator_id, operation_desc ) VALUES ( #{workId}, #{operationType}, #{operationTime}, #{operatorId}, #{operationDesc} )
